raw:
The implementation looks correct. Let me verify against the dc7d213 commit and check imports, then run the test.
All checks pass: `setCurrentQuestionIndex` removed, `cycleFocusMode` added back, `goToNextQuestion`/`openFocusedChoiceNote` gone. Now the test.
All target behaviors confirmed in `index.ts`, `logic.ts` untouched, and the test passes (theme.bg guard, whole-question note guard, pure logic tests).

Verified specifics:
- Note-mode: Esc‚Üí`saveActiveNoteAndReturnToOptions`, Tab/Enter‚Üí`cycleFocusedArea`, ‚Üê/‚Üí translated to `\x1bb`/`\x1bf` word-move with explanatory comment (index.ts:178-181)
- Options-mode: Esc‚Üí`this.done(null)` (index.ts:203), ‚Üê/‚Üí‚Üí`switchQuestionTab`, Tab‚Üí`cycleFocusedArea`; no `goToNextQuestion`/`openFocusedChoiceNote`/`e` block
- Imports: `setCurrentQuestionIndex` removed, `cycleFocusMode` restored; constructor `onSubmit` restored; `helpText` matches exactly

VERDICT: SUCCESS
